description.en: Watch as much as you want on YOUKU! Here you will find a wide variety of TV shows, movies, anime, and more with subtitles in your preferred language. Enjoy!

settings.title: Privacy Mode
settings.description: Hide the title and other details from your Discord status

settings.title: Show Timestamp
settings.description: Show elapsed or remaining time in the activity

settings.title: Show Buttons
settings.description: Display interactive buttons in the Discord Activity

settings.title: Show Cover Art
settings.description: Use the show's poster as the large image when available

settings.title: Show Progress Percentage
settings.description: Append a progress percentage to the state line while watching

settings.title: Show Video Quality & Speed
settings.description: Append the current playback quality and speed to the state line

settings.title: Compact Mode
settings.description: Use shorter labels and truncate long titles
